name: Talkwalker Social Intelligence API
what_it_does: Talkwalker REST API for social listening and consumer intelligence platform. Enables AI agents to query brand mentions, retrieve social media analytics, access sentiment trends, monitor competitor intelligence, and integrate real-time media monitoring data into marketing and PR workflows. Talkwalker indexes 150+ million sources.
use_cases: Querying brand mention volume and sentiment from marketing analytics agents
Retrieving competitor intelligence and share-of-voice data from market research agents
Monitoring PR crisis signals and sentiment spikes from brand reputation agents
Integrating social listening data into content strategy and campaign agents
not_for: Real-time social media posting (Talkwalker is monitoring, not publishing)
Internal communications monitoring (Talkwalker monitors public sources)
best_when: A marketing, PR, or brand team using Talkwalker wants AI agents to surface brand intelligence, monitor sentiment trends, and integrate social listening data into reporting and strategy workflows.
avoid_when: Consumer intelligence data may contain PII in social mentions. Talkwalker is enterprise-priced — overkill for simple brand monitoring.

auth.notes: Talkwalker API key authentication. API access for enterprise customers. Contact Talkwalker for API credentials.

pricing.notes: Enterprise social intelligence platform. Significant investment. API access included with enterprise subscription.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits based on plan and query complexity

known_agent_gotchas: No public MCP server — enterprise REST API integration required
API access requires enterprise contract — not self-serve
Social mention data may include PII in public posts — GDPR compliance required
Query complexity affects response time significantly for large date ranges
Data freshness varies by source — near-real-time for major platforms, delayed for others
agent_readiness.security_notes: Social mention data may contain PII in public posts. SOC2, GDPR. EU data residency. Enterprise API access only.

security_score_components.security_notes: Public social media data with potential PII in mentions. SOC2, GDPR. EU data residency.
